studied the moment. then.. chaos followed. 🤯⚡️🚲

clock hits 🕓lmo and suddenly it’s chaos o’clock. 

cuando el reloj marca 🕓lmo, de repente es la hora del caos.

don't overthink it. 🙂‍↕️🕹️🌪️
it's Predator or F50. choose one.
